_doc: Optional user-level file at ~/.cursor/permissions.json. For ABYSS work, keep this MINIMAL so repo .cursor/permissions.json stays SSOT. Do not duplicate approvalMode or terminalAllowlist here unless you need the same policy in every repo on this machine.

block_instructions: Machine-local: never auto-run diskpart, format, registry edits, or OS-wide security changes without explicit chat approval.
